title: Introduction to BasaltCRM
content:
# Introduction to BasaltCRM

Welcome to **BasaltCRM**, the AI-native revenue operating system built for modern sales teams. BasaltCRM unifies your entire Go-To-Market lifecycle — from lead discovery to project delivery and customer success — into a single, intelligent workspace.

## Core Capabilities

BasaltCRM is more than a pipeline tracker. It's a complete business engine with over **30 integrated modules** designed to give your team an unfair advantage.

### 1. AI-First Architecture
*   **LeadGen Wizard**: Autonomous AI agents crawl the web to discover, qualify, and populate your pipeline. No more empty desks.
*   **AI Insights Widget**: Neural health checks across revenue risk, data integrity, task velocity, contract status, and campaign performance — all surfaced on your dashboard.
*   **AI Lab**: Built-in prompt engineering workspace with multi-model support (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure AI, Google, Mistral, DeepSeek).
*   **Smart Chat**: An omnipresent assistant trained on your business context.

### 2. Revenue Operations
*   **Full GTM Pipeline**: Campaigns → LeadGen → Accounts → Lists → Contacts → Leads → Opportunities → Quotes → Contracts → Invoices → Projects → Cases. Every entity linked, every signal tracked.
*   **Drag-and-Drop Dashboard**: 20+ configurable widgets including Revenue Pacing, Outreach ROI, Lead Pools, AI Insights, Team Analytics, and a full Kanban board.
*   **Sales Command**: A unified command center for personal and team performance analytics.

### 3. Telephony & Voice AI
*   **BasaltECHO**: Deploy real-time AI voice agents capable of natural conversations — inbound support, outbound prospecting, and live meeting booking. Powered by ultra-low latency WebRTC streaming.
*   **Integrated Dialer**: Web-based telephony with call history, recordings, and CRM-context during calls.

### 4. Support & Operations
*   **Cases & Knowledge Base**: Full service-cloud capabilities with SLA tracking, ticket priorities, and a self-service help center to deflect issues.
*   **Calendar & Events**: Unified scheduling, meeting bookings, and team availability management integrated directly with CRM entities.

### 5. Automation & Workflows
*   **FlowState**: A visual, node-based workflow builder powered by React Flow for complex process automation.
*   **Outreach Sequences**: Automated multi-channel sequences (Email, SMS, Tasks) with AI personalization.

## Navigation Overview

*   **Dashboard**: Your command center with high-level KPIs and configurable widgets.
*   **CRM Core**: Accounts, Contacts, Leads, and Opportunities.
*   **Sales Command**: Personal and team performance analytics.
*   **AI Lab**: Prompt engineering and AI agent configuration.
*   **LeadGen Wizard**: Autonomous prospect discovery.
*   **Lead Pools**: Lead distribution and campaign management.
*   **Outreach**: Automated multi-channel sequences.
*   **FlowState**: Visual workflow automation.
*   **Projects & Tasks**: Delivery management.
*   **Quotes & Contracts**: Proposal and deal closing tools.
*   **Invoices**: Billing and payment management.
*   **Calendar**: Unified meeting and resource scheduling.
*   **BasaltECHO**: AI voice agent deployment and configuration.
*   **Dialer**: Integrated web telephony.
*   **University**: Interactive guides, certifications, and platform training.
*   **Messages**: Internal team communication.
*   **Form Builder**: Embeddable lead capture forms.
*   **Reports**: Business analytics and custom reports.
*   **Cases**: Support ticket and SLA management.
*   **Knowledge Base**: Help center articles and category management.
*   **Products**: Product and inventory catalog.
*   **Approvals**: Enterprise approval workflows.
*   **Guard Rules**: Data validation logic management.

## Need Help?

*   **Docs**: You are here!
*   **University**: Visit [University](/crm/university) for interactive walkthroughs, certifications, and visual GTM flowcharts.
*   **Discord**: Join our community for real-time engineering support.

title: Initial Setup & Configuration
content:
# Initial Setup & Configuration

Configure your workspace to match your business processes. A proper setup ensures your team can hit the ground running.

## 1. Company Profile

Navigate to **Settings > My Account**. This information appears on official documents like Invoices, Quotes, and Contracts.
*   **Company Name**: Your official business name (used on PDF exports).
*   **Logo**: Upload a high-resolution PNG for branding.
*   **Address & Contact**: Used for invoices and contract headers.

## 2. Branding (White Labeling)

Customize the client-facing experience in **Settings > Branding**.
*   **Logo**: Upload your company logo for the navigation bar.
*   **Primary Color**: Set your brand color for accents across the platform.
*   **Custom Theme**: Choose from preset themes or create your own.

## 3. Departmental Roles & Permissions

BasaltCRM features a granular, hierarchical permission system. Manage roles in **Admin > Roles**.
*   **Platform Admin**: God-mode access across all teams (reserved for platform owners).
*   **Super Admin**: Full access across a specific team's resources.
*   **Admin**: Full access to department resources.
*   **Member**: Standard access to assigned resources.
*   **Viewer**: Read-only access to view data.

Each role can be customized at the module and widget level. For example, you can allow a Member to view the Dashboard but hide Team Analytics and Gamification widgets.

## 4. User Management

Invite your team in **Admin > Users**.
*   Assign users to specific **Teams** for full data isolation.
*   Set their **Role** to control access levels.
*   Use bulk actions to manage users at scale (list, column, and grid views available).

## 5. Module Selection

Every module is permission-gated via the role system. Admins can enable or disable modules per role to keep the interface clean and focused. The full module list includes over 30 options — from Dashboard and CRM Core to advanced tools like Guard Rules and Approval Chains.

## 6. AI & Provider Configuration

Configure your AI and communication providers in **Admin > AI Settings**.
*   **AI Models**: Connect OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure AI, Google, Mistral, or DeepSeek.
*   **Email Provider**: Configure Resend or AWS SES for outbound email.
*   **BasaltECHO**: Connect your BasaltECHO wallet for AI voice agent integration.
*   **LeadGen Credits**: Purchase and manage LeadGen credit bundles.

## 7. Subscription Plans

BasaltCRM offers tiered plans that control feature access and capacity:
*   **FREE**: Core CRM features with limited AI credits (50-100 accounts).
*   **BASIC**: Extended features with standard enrichment (500-750 accounts).
*   **PRO**: Full platform access with agentic deep research (2,500-3,000 accounts).

title: CRM Core: Contacts & Accounts
content:
# Contacts & Accounts

Manage your business ecosystem with granular control over people and organizations. The **Account** is the foundational anchor of BasaltCRM — all other entities orbit around it.

## The Data Model

BasaltCRM uses a B2B-first data model:
*   **Accounts**: Organizations or Companies. This is the parent entity and the permanent source of truth.
*   **Contacts**: Individuals linked to an Account (or standalone). Decision-makers, champions, and stakeholders.

## Account Detail Page

Each Account has a rich detail view with configurable widgets:
*   **Basic Info**: Company overview, industry, website, and custom fields.
*   **Tasks Widget**: Tasks associated with the account.
*   **Contacts Widget**: All linked contacts with quick-add capability.
*   **Opportunities Widget**: Active and historical deals.
*   **Contracts Widget**: Associated signed and pending contracts.
*   **Leads Widget**: Leads tied to the account.
*   **Documents Widget**: Uploaded files and attachments.
*   **Timeline**: A chronological activity feed of all interactions.

## Contact Detail Page

Each Contact also has a dedicated detail view:
*   **Profile Card**: Name, title, email, phone, and social links.
*   **Communication History**: Email and SMS interaction log.
*   **Opportunities Widget**: Deals they're associated with.
*   **Tasks Widget**: Assigned tasks.
*   **Linked Accounts**: Companies they belong to.
*   **Documents Widget**: Uploaded files.

## Relationship Flow

Understand how entities connect in the GTM lifecycle:
1.  **Account** is discovered (via LeadGen Wizard or manual creation).
2.  **Contacts** are found within the Account during outreach.
3.  **Leads** are created when contacts show interest.
4.  **Opportunities** are opened when leads qualify.

## Key Actions

*   **Create, Edit, Delete**: Full CRUD on both Accounts and Contacts.
*   **Import/Export**: CSV import and export for bulk operations.
*   **Add Notes**: Create timeline notes for institutional knowledge.

For a visual representation of these relationships, check the **Entity Relationships** diagram in [University](/crm/university).

title: Leads & Pipeline Management
content:
# Leads & Pipeline Management

Turn cold prospects into loyal customers using our visual pipeline, AI-driven outreach, and structured qualification process.

## Pipeline Stages

The standard pipeline follows these stages:
*   **Identify**: Initial discovery — the lead is in the queue.
*   **Engage (AI)**: The AI outreach engine sends initial personalized contact.
*   **Engage (Human)**: A sales rep takes over for high-touch follow-up.
*   **Offering**: A formal proposal or quote has been sent.
*   **Finalizing**: Negotiation, contract drafting, and final details.
*   **Closed**: Deal finalized — Won or Lost.
*   **Converted**: Lead has been fully converted to an Account with associated Contacts.

## Views

The Leads module supports multiple views:
*   **All Leads**: A comprehensive table view with advanced filtering.
*   **Workspace**: A pipeline/Kanban workspace for visual stage management.
*   **Dialer View**: An embedded dialer interface for phone-based outreach directly from the leads list.

## Conversion Rules

*   **Lead → Contact**: Happens automatically when you send the first message via a Sequence, or manually.
*   **Lead → Opportunity**: Created when the lead qualifies and shows buying intent.
*   **Opportunity Won → Account + Project**: Automatically creates an Account record and a delivery Project when a deal closes.

## Key Actions

*   **Create Lead**: Add leads manually or via LeadGen Wizard.
*   **Import/Export**: Bulk CSV operations.
*   **Assign Lead**: Route leads to specific reps.
*   **Convert to Deal**: Promote a qualified lead to an Opportunity.
*   **Delete Lead**: Remove from the pipeline.

See the [GTM Playbook](/docs/gtm-playbook) for a deep dive into the 10-step lifecycle flow, or visit [University](/crm/university) for interactive visual walkthroughs.

title: Opportunities & Deals
content:
# Opportunities & Deals

Track revenue potential from qualification through to close. Opportunities represent active deals in your pipeline.

## Views

*   **Pipeline View**: A visual Kanban board where you can drag-and-drop deals across stages.
*   **List View**: A detailed table view with sorting, filtering, and batch actions.
*   **Detail View**: A dedicated page for each deal with linked entities and activity history.

## Detail Page Widgets

*   **Deal Overview**: Value, stage, probability, close date, and custom fields.
*   **Linked Accounts**: The company associated with the deal.
*   **Linked Contacts**: Decision-makers and stakeholders involved.
*   **Documents**: Proposals, contracts, and supporting files.

## Key Actions

*   **Create Deal**: Open a new opportunity from a qualified lead or directly.
*   **Move Stages**: Drag-and-drop on the Kanban board or update via the detail view.
*   **Mark Won/Lost**: Close the deal with a status and reason.
*   **Generate Quote**: Create a formal quote directly from the opportunity (links to [Quotes](/docs/quotes-products)).
*   **Edit/Delete**: Full CRUD operations.

## Pipeline Metrics

The Dashboard provides real-time pipeline metrics:
*   **Total Pipeline Value**: Sum of all open opportunities.
*   **Revenue Pacing**: Projected revenue vs. target.
*   **Conversion Rate**: Stage-over-stage conversion percentages.
*   **Average Deal Cycle**: Time from creation to close.

title: LeadGen Wizard
content:
# LeadGen Wizard: Autonomous Prospecting Engine

The LeadGen Wizard is BasaltCRM's autonomous prospecting engine. It discovers high-intent targets and bridges the gap between raw data and outreach-ready lists.

**Core Mantra:** Human-in-the-loop leads to higher deliverability. Data remains in "Staging" (Candidates) until a human approves it for Lists.

## Discovery Modes

### Basic Mode (Budget)
*   Uses cached Global Data + raw SERP API.
*   **Speed**: Seconds per batch.
*   **Depth**: Homepage meta tags and search result snippets.
*   **Cost**: Low (1 Credit per company found).
*   **Best For**: High-volume, broad discovery.

### Advanced Mode (Deep Research)
*   Deploys an LLM Agent for autonomous multi-site crawls.
*   Analyzes "Team" pages, "Case Studies", and pricing pages to infer intent.
*   Uses clean extraction prompts to bypass noise (popups, promotions).
*   **Speed**: Minutes per batch.
*   **Cost**: 5 Credits per crawl, 25 Credits per full agentic session.
*   **Best For**: Quality-first, deep qualification.

## The Workflow

1.  **Intelligence Gathering**: Define your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) targeting — industry, geo, tech stack, company size.
2.  **Global Deduplication**: The system checks `crm_Global_Companies` and `crm_Global_Persons` to avoid paying for duplicate data. Records older than 90 days trigger a re-crawl.
3.  **Compliance Filter**: Customer blacklist check, MX record verification, SMTP handshake, and noise filtering ensure domain reputation is protected.
4.  **Staging & Human Approval**: Scraped leads land as `Lead Candidates` with evidence logs and ICP scores. Humans click "Approve" to promote candidates to real Contacts and add them to Lists.

## Capacity by Plan

*   **FREE**: 100 Credits/month, 50-100 accounts, Basic Discovery only.
*   **BASIC**: 1,000 Credits/month, 500-750 accounts, Discovery + Standard Enrichment.
*   **PRO**: 5,000 Credits/month, 2,500-3,000 accounts, Full Agentic + Deep Research.

## Credit Lifecycle

*   **Monthly Reset**: Credits reset at the start of each billing cycle.
*   **Top-Ups**: Users can purchase one-time credit bundles if they run out early.
*   **Tracking**: Real-time credit balances and historical usage are visible in **Admin > AI Settings**.

title: Sequences: Automated Outreach
content:
# Sequences: Automated Multi-Channel Outreach

Scale your sales development with intelligent, multi-channel sequences powered by AI personalization.

## What is a Sequence?

A **Sequence** is a series of automated steps executed over time. Steps can include:
*   **Emails**: AI-composed messages with React Email templates.
*   **SMS**: Text outreach via AWS Pinpoint.
*   **Tasks**: Manual follow-up reminders for the sales rep.
*   **Delays**: Configurable wait periods between steps.

## AI Personalization

BasaltCRM's AI engine personalizes every interaction:
*   **Icebreakers**: Scrapes prospect data to write unique, relevant openings.
*   **Tone Matching**: Adjusts messaging based on the target's industry and role.
*   **Context Awareness**: Uses deal and account data to inform messaging.

## Email Infrastructure

Outreach is powered by enterprise-grade delivery:
*   **Resend**: Primary email delivery engine.
*   **AWS SES**: Scalable fallback for high-volume sends.
*   **Google & Microsoft OAuth**: Native Gmail and Outlook inbox integration for sending from your own address.
*   **MX Verification**: Every email address is verified before send to protect your domain reputation.

## The Sequence Workflow

1.  **Create a Campaign**: Define the context, goal, and target audience within a Lead Pool.
2.  **Build the Sequence**: Add steps (email, SMS, task, delay) with AI-generated content.
3.  **Assign Lead Pool**: Attach a pool of leads to the sequence.
4.  **Launch**: Start the automated engine. Monitor open rates, click-through, and replies.

## Outreach Status Tracking

Every lead in a sequence is tracked through these statuses:
*   **IDLE** → **PENDING** → **SENT** → **OPENED** → **MEETING_LINK_CLICKED** → **MEETING_BOOKED** → **CLOSED** → **CONVERTED**.

title: BasaltECHO: AI Voice Agents
content:
# BasaltECHO: Real-Time AI Voice Conversations

BasaltECHO is BasaltCRM's AI voice platform — deploy "Digital Employees" capable of professional-grade, ultra-low latency voice conversations.

## Capabilities

*   **Inbound**: AI handles customer inquiries, routes calls, and answers FAQs using your knowledge base.
*   **Outbound**: AI calls and qualifies leads automatically based on your campaign parameters.
*   **Calendar Integration**: Agents can book meetings directly into your team's calendar.
*   **Real-Time Streaming**: Ultra-low latency (<100ms) voice via WebRTC.
*   **Multi-Language**: Support for 100+ languages.

## Voice Agent Setup

1.  **Persona**: Define the agent's name, character, communication style, and domain expertise.
2.  **Voice Selection**: Choose from 100+ realistic neural voices.
3.  **Knowledge Base**: Provide the agent with your company's FAQs, pricing, product details, and objection handling scripts.
4.  **System Prompt**: Use the AI Lab to craft and push system prompts to BasaltECHO.

## CRM Integration

BasaltECHO connects directly to your CRM context:
*   **Push Prompts**: Use the AI Lab to push system prompts per wallet to BasaltECHO.
*   **Engage AI Panel**: During live calls in the Dialer, the AI Sales Agent panel provides real-time talking points and objection handling.
*   **Auto-Start**: When configured, BasaltECHO automatically starts listening during calls for real-time assistance.
*   **Credit Balance**: View your BasaltECHO credit balance in **Admin > Billing**.

## Payment Model (UCP / x402)

BasaltECHO uses agentic commerce for provisioning:
*   **Settlement**: USDC on the Base network via the SURGE protocol.
*   **x402 Flows**: Challenge/Response based provisioning for decentralized autonomous agents.
*   **Credit Top-Ups**: Purchase credits via the Admin billing dashboard using standard or crypto payment methods.

## Use Cases

*   **Content Creators**: Twitter Spaces integration, custom AI personalities, live audience engagement.
*   **Business Teams**: Customer support agents, multi-language support, usage analytics.
*   **Developers**: RESTful API access, WebRTC streaming SDK, flexible deployment.

title: FlowState: Visual Workflows
content:
# FlowState: Visual Workflow Builder

FlowState is BasaltCRM's powerful visual editor for creating advanced automations. Build complex logic without writing code.

## Building a Flow

Using a drag-and-drop interface powered by React Flow, connect nodes to create logic chains:
*   **Triggers**: What starts the flow (e.g., "New Lead Created", "Deal Won", "Form Submitted", "Task Overdue").
*   **Actions**: What the system does (e.g., "Send Email", "Create Task", "Update Field", "Assign to Rep", "Push Notification").
*   **Logic Nodes**: If/Else conditions, Delays, Split paths, and Merge points.

## Workflow Management

*   **Create/Edit/Delete**: Full CRUD on workflow designs.
*   **Activate/Pause**: Toggle workflows on and off without deleting them.
*   **Execution Logs**: View a complete history of every workflow run, including success/failure details and timing.

## Common Use Cases

*   **Lead Routing**: Automatically assign leads to specific reps based on territory, industry, or deal size.
*   **Deal Follow-up**: Schedule reminders if a deal stays in a stage for too long.
*   **Post-Sale Onboarding**: Trigger a series of tasks, emails, and project creation when a deal is closed.
*   **Approval Workflows**: Route requests through the Approvals module based on value thresholds.
*   **Form Response Handling**: Automatically create leads from Form Builder submissions and route them to the right team.

## Mermaid Diagram Editor

FlowState also includes a **Mermaid diagram editor** for creating documentation-as-code flowcharts. These diagrams are used throughout the [University](/crm/university) module for GTM playbooks and architectural documentation.

title: Tasks & Project Management
content:
# Tasks & Project Management

Manage deliverables and team collaboration using flexible project boards and a global task system.

## Projects (Boards)

Projects are containers for specific initiatives — a client engagement, a sales campaign, or an internal sprint.

### Views
*   **Kanban Board**: Visual drag-and-drop cards across status columns.
*   **List View**: Sortable table for large projects.

### Detail Page
*   **Comments**: Threaded discussion for team collaboration.
*   **Attachments**: Upload and manage project files.
*   **Button Sets**: Configurable action buttons per project (customizable per user).

### Project Opportunities
Sales teams can post **Project Opportunities** (Feature Buildouts, Commissioned Work) within projects, linking directly to invoices for revenue tracking.

## Global Tasks

The Tasks module provides a unified view of all tasks across every project and context:
*   **Task List**: Filter by assignee, status, priority, and due date.
*   **Calendar View**: See tasks plotted on a calendar for deadline management.
*   **Create/Edit/Complete/Delete**: Standard task operations with assignment and notifications.

## The GTM Project Workflow

1.  **Admin** creates a Campaign with ICP targeting.
2.  **LeadGen Wizard** populates Accounts and Contacts.
3.  **Admin** creates Lead Pools and assigns them to Members.
4.  **Admin** creates a Project Board and assigns Lead Pools + Members.
5.  **Members** execute outreach, manage tasks, and move leads through the pipeline.
6.  **Won deals** automatically generate Projects for delivery tracking.

Check the [GTM Playbook](/docs/gtm-playbook) or [University](/crm/university) for visual walkthroughs.

title: Lead Pools & Campaign Management
content:
# Lead Pools & Campaign Management

Lead Pools are the distribution engine of BasaltCRM — segmented collections of leads organized for targeted outreach.

## What is a Lead Pool?

A Lead Pool is a curated list of leads grouped for a specific campaign, territory, or sales initiative. Pools serve as the bridge between the LeadGen Wizard's discovery output and your Outreach Sequences.

## Key Features

*   **ICP Configuration**: Each pool stores its own Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) settings, which drive the LeadGen Wizard's targeting.
*   **Team Assignment**: Pools are scoped to teams and can be assigned to specific members.
*   **Member Assignment**: Multiple members can work the same pool collaboratively.
*   **Campaign Linking**: Pools connect directly to Outreach Campaigns for automated sequences.
*   **Color Coding**: Visual organization with custom colors.
*   **Document Attachment**: Attach sales collateral, playbooks, and reference materials directly to pools.

## Pool Lifecycle

1.  **Create Pool**: Define a name, description, and ICP parameters.
2.  **Run LeadGen Wizard**: Discover and populate the pool with Lead Candidates.
3.  **Approve Candidates**: Human review promotes candidates to Contacts and Lists.
4.  **Assign to Team**: Route the pool to specific members for execution.
5.  **Launch Outreach**: Connect the pool to an Outreach Sequence for automated engagement.

## Pool Views

*   **Pool Dashboard**: Overview of all pools with status, count, and assignment info.
*   **Pool Detail**: Drill into a specific pool to see all leads, candidates, and linked campaigns.

## Integration Points

*   **LeadGen Wizard**: Pools are the target for AI-discovered leads.
*   **Outreach Sequences**: Pools feed directly into automated campaigns.
*   **Projects**: Pools can be linked to Project Boards for task management.

title: Quotes & Products
content:
# Quotes & Product Catalog

Create professional proposals and manage your product inventory with BasaltCRM's integrated quoting system.

## Product Catalog

The Products module serves as your master inventory:
*   **Create Products**: Define product name, SKU, description, and pricing.
*   **Edit/Delete**: Full product lifecycle management.
*   **Quote Integration**: Products are selected when building quotes.

## Quotes

Generate formal proposals directly from Opportunities or standalone:
*   **Create Quote**: Select products, define quantities, apply discounts, and set terms.
*   **PDF Export**: Generate branded PDF proposals dynamically branded with your team's company name (e.g., "BasaltHQ PROPOSAL").
*   **Edit/Delete**: Modify quotes before sending.
*   **Link to Opportunity**: Connect quotes to deals for pipeline tracking.

## The Closing Workflow

1.  **Opportunity qualified** → Generate a Quote.
2.  **Quote approved** → Draft a Contract.
3.  **Contract signed** → Issue an Invoice.
4.  **Invoice paid** → Mark deal "Close Won" and create a Project for delivery.

This end-to-end flow is tracked across the Opportunities, Quotes, Contracts, and Invoices modules with full audit history.

title: Invoices, Contracts & Payments
content:
# Invoices, Contracts & Payments

Close the loop by turning signed deals into revenue.

## Contracts

The Contracts module manages your deal documentation:
*   **Draft Contract**: Create contracts from templates or from scratch.
*   **PDF Preview**: View the document before sending.
*   **E-Signatures**: Send contracts for digital signature.
*   **Signature Tracking**: Monitor who has signed and who hasn't.
*   **Void Contract**: Cancel a contract if the deal falls through.

### Deal Rooms (Digital Sales Rooms)

Contracts can be presented through **Deal Rooms** — interactive proposal sites that give prospects a polished, branded experience:
*   **Create Room**: Generate a room from any contract.
*   **Analytics**: Track when prospects view the room, which sections they spend time on, and engagement metrics.
*   **Access Control**: Rooms are scoped and permission-controlled.

## Invoices

Generate invoices from closed deals or upload external invoices:
*   **View Invoices**: List all invoices with status tracking.
*   **Upload Invoice**: Import invoices from external systems.
*   **AI-Generated**: Invoices can be auto-generated using the SURGE integration.

## PortalPay

Clients access a dedicated portal to view their history and pay:
*   **Credit Card**: Standard card payments.
*   **Crypto**: USDC on Base network.
*   **Mercury Bank**: Direct bank-to-bank payment flows.

## Billing Workflow

1.  **Mark Won**: Opportunity is closed successfully.
2.  **Generate Contract**: Draft and send for E-Signature.
3.  **Issue Invoice**: Sent directly to the client via a secure portal.
4.  **Payment Received**: Deal lifecycle complete.

title: The 10-Step GTM Playbook
content:
# The 10-Step GTM Playbook

This is the definitive Go-To-Market lifecycle of BasaltCRM. Every entity in the system maps to a phase in this playbook.

## Phase 1: Foundation (Workspace & Strategy)

The critical infrastructure setup and initial campaign definition.
1.  **Admin Setup**: Configure providers — Resend (Email), BasaltECHO (Voice), S3 (Storage).
2.  **Campaign Created**: Every lead, account, and list is tied to a Campaign for ROI tracking.
3.  **ICP Defined**: The Campaign defines the Ideal Customer Profile that AI agents use to find companies.

## Phase 2: Discovery (LeadGen & Population)

Turning vision into a targeted work queue using autonomous research agents.
4.  **LeadGen Wizard (Step 2)**: Runs against companies based on campaign parameters. Populates the Accounts table and builds targeted Lists.
5.  **Lists & Assignment (Step 3)**: Discovered accounts are segmented into curated Lists (e.g., "SaaS Founders - California") and assigned to specific Reps.

## Phase 3: Engagement (Outreach & Discovery)

First contact and discovery of individuals within targeted companies.
6.  **Outreach (Step 4)**: Team members contact companies using the integrated Dialer or AI Emailer via Sequences.
7.  **Contact Discovery (Step 5)**: During outreach, specific decision-makers (Contacts) are found and attached to the Account record.
8.  **Promotion (Step 6)**: When a contact shows interest, they are promoted — manually or via intent signals — to a Lead.

## Phase 4: Qualification (Pipeline Mastery)

Transforming interest into formal opportunities and revenue-ready deals.
9.  **Qualification (Step 7)**: The lead is vetted. If they match the "Success Path," an Opportunity is created.
10. **Closing Sequence (Step 8)**: The rep generates a Quote, flows into a Contract, and deploys the Invoice.
11. **Close Won (Step 9)**: Payment secured, deal marked "Close Won."

## Phase 5: Delivery & Enrichment (The Loop)

Converting sales success into operational delivery while maintaining a perfect data record.
12. **Project Creation (Step 9)**: A project is automatically created upon closing, moving data from Sales to Delivery.
13. **Deep Enrichment (Step 10)**: Throughout the lifecycle, every signal, contact, and interaction enriches the Account record — creating a permanent source of truth.

## Key Principle

**Account is the Parent.** Leads, Opportunities, Contacts, and Projects all orbit the Account record. It is the fundamental anchor of BasaltCRM.

title: Dashboard & Widgets
content:
# Dashboard & Widgets

Your command center with high-level KPIs, configurable widgets, and real-time business intelligence.

## Widget Library

The Dashboard supports 20+ draggable, configurable widgets:

### Core Widgets
*   **Welcome Message**: Personalized greeting card.
*   **Stats Overview**: Top-line metrics row (leads, deals, revenue, tasks).
*   **Daily Tasks**: Today's task list with quick-complete actions.
*   **Recent Messages**: Latest internal team communications.
*   **My Leads**: Personal lead summary and pipeline snapshot.
*   **New Projects**: Active and recently created project boards.

### Analytics Widgets
*   **Team Analytics**: Performance charts by team and individual.
*   **Revenue Pacing**: Projected vs. actual revenue tracking.
*   **Outreach ROI**: Campaign performance and engagement metrics.
*   **Conversion Charts**: Funnel metrics and stage-over-stage analysis.

### AI & Intelligence
*   **AI Insights**: Neural health checks across revenue risk, data integrity, task velocity, contract status, and campaign performance — each with a confidence score.

### Engagement Widgets
*   **Gamification**: Leaderboards and points-based performance tracking.
*   **Jump Back In**: Quick-access to recently viewed records.
*   **Notification Center**: System notifications with count badges.

## Customization

*   **Drag-and-Drop**: Rearrange widgets to match your workflow.
*   **Permission-Gated**: Admins can control which widgets each role can see.
*   **Export**: Export dashboard data for reporting.

## Sales Command

For deeper analytics, the **Sales Command** module offers:
*   **My Command**: Personal performance dashboard.
*   **Team Command**: Manager-level team analytics.
*   **Unified Analytics**: Cross-module insights with leaderboards, conversion charts, and activity feeds.

title: Messages & Team Communication
content:
# Messages & Internal Communication

BasaltCRM includes a full internal messaging system for team collaboration — built like a professional email client.

## Features

*   **Compose**: Send messages to one or multiple team members.
*   **Recipients**: TO, CC, and BCC support for proper routing.
*   **Threading**: Full conversation threading for organized discussions.
*   **Priority Levels**: LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, URGENT — with visual indicators.
*   **Labels & Tags**: Organize messages with custom labels.
*   **Starring**: Star important messages for quick access.
*   **Attachments**: Attach documents and files to messages.

## Inbox Management

*   **Read/Unread Tracking**: Per-recipient read status with timestamps.
*   **Archive**: Move old messages out of the inbox.
*   **Delete**: Soft-delete with recovery option.
*   **Search**: Full-text search across all messages.

## Team Scoping

All messages are scoped to your team. Messages stay within your organization's boundary, ensuring data isolation in multi-tenant environments.

title: Form Builder
content:
# Form Builder: Embeddable Lead Capture

Build beautiful, branded lead capture forms and embed them anywhere — on your website, landing pages, or share via direct link.

## Building a Form

*   **Drag-and-Drop Fields**: Add text, email, phone, select, multi-select, checkbox, radio, date, time, file upload, hidden fields, and consent checkboxes.
*   **Validation**: Required fields, min/max length, regex patterns.
*   **Branding**: Custom primary color, logo, and custom CSS.
*   **Success Behavior**: Show a thank you message or redirect to a URL.

## Field Types

| Field Type | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| Text / Textarea | Free-form input |
| Email / Phone | Validated contact fields |
| Select / Multi-Select | Dropdown or multi-choice |
| Checkbox / Radio | Toggle or exclusive choice |
| Date / Time / DateTime | Calendar pickers |
| File | Document upload |
| Hidden | Pre-filled data for tracking |
| Consent | GDPR/privacy checkboxes |

## Lead Mapping

Each field can be mapped to a CRM lead field (firstName, lastName, email, phone, company). When a submission is received, BasaltCRM can automatically create a Lead record.

## Submission Tracking

*   **Status**: NEW → VIEWED → CONVERTED → ARCHIVED.
*   **UTM Tracking**: Source, medium, and campaign parameters are captured automatically.
*   **Analytics**: View count and submission count per form.
*   **Webhooks**: Send submission data to external systems.
*   **Auto-Respond**: Send an automatic email reply to the submitter.
*   **Notifications**: Email alerts when a new submission arrives.

## Embedding

Each form gets a unique slug for public URL access. Embed via iFrame or JavaScript snippet on any external site.

## CAPTCHA Support

Enable CAPTCHA protection to prevent spam submissions.

title: Emails: Inbox Management
content:
# Emails: External Inbox Management

Manage your external email communications directly within BasaltCRM. Send, receive, and track emails without leaving the platform.

## Email Integration

*   **Google OAuth**: Connect your Gmail account for native send/receive.
*   **Microsoft OAuth**: Connect your Outlook account with full inbox sync.
*   **Custom SMTP**: Connect any email provider via SMTP configuration.

## AI Email Composer

BasaltCRM's AI engine helps you compose better emails:
*   **Context-Aware**: The AI considers the recipient's account data, deal stage, and interaction history.
*   **React Email Templates**: Professionally designed email templates that render consistently across clients.
*   **Icebreaker Generation**: AI scrapes prospect data to write relevant, unique openings.

## Email Delivery Infrastructure

*   **Resend**: Primary high-deliverability engine.
*   **AWS SES**: Scalable fallback for high-volume campaigns.
*   **MX Verification**: All recipient addresses are verified before sending to protect your domain reputation.

title: AI Lab & Prompt Engineering
content:
# AI Lab: Prompt Engineering Workspace

The AI Lab is BasaltCRM's built-in workspace for crafting, testing, and deploying AI prompts across the platform.

## Capabilities

*   **Prompt Generator**: Build and iterate on system prompts for various use cases — sales outreach, customer support, lead qualification, and more.
*   **Multi-Model Support**: Test prompts across multiple AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure AI, Google, Mistral, DeepSeek) to find the best fit.
*   **Push to BasaltECHO**: Deploy polished system prompts directly to your BasaltECHO voice agents with one click.

## Integration Points

*   **Outreach Sequences**: Prompts crafted in the AI Lab power the AI personalization in your email sequences.
*   **BasaltECHO**: System prompts pushed from the AI Lab define your voice agent's persona and knowledge.
*   **Smart Chat**: The platform's omnipresent AI assistant uses context from your CRM data — Accounts, Leads, Opportunities, Contacts, Tasks, and more.

## Smart Chat Context

The Smart Chat assistant has deep knowledge of your business context, including:
*   Account and Contact records
*   Opportunity pipeline status
*   Task assignments and deadlines
*   Lead status and scores
*   Invoice and contract data
*   Documentation articles

title: Dialer & Telephony
content:
# Dialer: Integrated Web Telephony

Make and receive calls directly from BasaltCRM with full CRM context at your fingertips.

## Features

*   **Web-Based Dialer**: No hardware or phone system required — make calls directly from your browser.
*   **Keypad Interface**: Standard dial pad with click-to-call from any Contact or Lead record.
*   **Call History**: Full log of inbound and outbound calls with timestamps and durations.
*   **Recordings**: Record calls for training, compliance, and quality assurance.
*   **Download**: Export call recordings for external use.

## CRM Context During Calls

When a call is in progress, the Dialer provides:
*   **Contact Info**: Full profile of the person you're speaking with.
*   **Account Context**: Company details, deal history, and recent interactions.
*   **Engage AI Panel**: Real-time AI-powered talking points, objection handling, and call coaching.
*   **BasaltECHO Auto-Start**: If configured, BasaltECHO automatically starts listening during calls for real-time AI assistance.

## Telephony Infrastructure

*   **AWS Chime SDK**: Enterprise-grade WebRTC with SIP mixing and streaming transcription.
*   **Azure AI Communication**: Gateway for advanced voice routing.
*   **EventBridge**: Call event orchestration and webhook delivery.

title: Cases: Service Cloud
content:
# Cases: Service Cloud Case Management

Manage customer support inquiries, bug reports, and service requests with BasaltCRM's Cases module.

## Features

*   **Create Case**: Open new support cases with detailed descriptions, priority, and assignee.
*   **Edit Case**: Update case details, status, and resolution notes.
*   **View Cases**: List and filter all cases by status, priority, assignee, or date.
*   **Delete Case**: Remove resolved or duplicate cases.

## Use Cases

*   **Customer Support**: Track and resolve customer inquiries from first contact to resolution.
*   **Bug Tracking**: Internal issue management for product and engineering teams.
*   **Escalation**: Route high-priority cases to senior team members.

## Integration

*   **Account Linking**: Cases can be associated with specific Accounts for full context.
*   **Contact Linking**: Link cases to the individual Contact who reported the issue.
*   **Notifications**: Case updates trigger system notifications to assigned team members.

title: Approvals & Guard Rules
content:
# Approvals & Guard Rules

Enterprise governance features for data integrity and process control.

## Approvals

The Approvals module manages request-based workflows for operations that need sign-off before execution.

*   **View Approvals**: See all pending, approved, and rejected requests.
*   **Manage Approvals**: Approve or reject requests with comments.
*   **Routing**: Requests can be routed based on type, value threshold, or team hierarchy.

### Common Approval Scenarios
*   Discounts above a set threshold on Quotes.
*   Contract modifications after initial signing.
*   Budget changes on Projects.
*   Lead reassignments between teams.

## Guard Rules (Validation Logic)

Guard Rules enforce data quality by defining validation logic that runs before records are saved.

*   **View Rules**: Access the full list of active validation rules.
*   **Manage Rules**: Create, edit, and toggle rules on/off.

### Example Guard Rules
*   **Required Fields**: Ensure "Industry" is filled before an Account can be created.
*   **Value Constraints**: Opportunity close date cannot be in the past.
*   **Format Validation**: Email addresses must match a valid pattern.
*   **Business Logic**: Cannot mark a deal "Won" without an associated Quote.

Both modules are available to Admin and Super Admin roles by default, and can be configured per role in the permission matrix.

title: Reports & Analytics
content:
# Reports & Business Analytics

Get deep insights into your business performance with BasaltCRM's reporting tools.

## Report Types

*   **Pipeline Reports**: Opportunity funnel, stage-over-stage conversion, and revenue projections.
*   **Activity Reports**: Team activity — calls made, emails sent, tasks completed.
*   **Lead Source Reports**: Where your best leads come from (LeadGen Wizard, Forms, Manual, Import).
*   **Revenue Reports**: Closed-won deals, average deal size, and revenue by team or rep.
*   **Engagement Reports**: Outreach sequence performance — open rates, click-through rates, and reply rates.

## Employee & Databox

### Employees
The Employees module provides staff management — view and manage your team roster with role, department, and activity tracking.

### Databox
Databox is a flexible custom data storage module. Use it for any structured data that doesn't fit neatly into the standard CRM modules — custom KPIs, external data imports, or internal metrics.

## Notifications

The Notification Center aggregates all system events:
*   New lead assignments
*   Deal stage changes
*   Task completions and overdue alerts
*   Approval requests
*   Case updates
*   System announcements

title: CRM University
content:
# CRM University

Master BasaltCRM through interactive diagrams, certification paths, simulations, and guided walkthroughs.

## Key Resources

### Workflow Diagrams
Visual Mermaid-powered flowcharts covering the entire 10-step GTM lifecycle. Multi-page diagram rendering for detailed architectural documentation.

### Certification Paths
Guided learning tracks for onboarding new reps:
*   **CRM Fundamentals**: Navigation, data model, and basic workflows.
*   **Sales Operations**: Pipeline management, quoting, and deal closing.
*   **Outreach Mastery**: Sequences, LeadGen Wizard, and Lead Pools.
*   **Admin Certification**: Roles, permissions, AI configuration, and team management.

### RevOps Simulator
An interactive training environment to practice the full sales cycle in a sandbox — from lead discovery to deal close.

### AI Prompt Lab
Part of the University module, the Prompt Lab provides workspace for prompt engineering with live testing against multiple AI models.

### Integration Blueprints
Visual documentation for connecting BasaltCRM to external systems — email providers, payment gateways, voice infrastructure, and storage backends.

### Points Calculator
Gamification rules showing how to level up your sales performance through consistent activity and milestone achievements.

## Plan-Based Access

*   **FREE**: Core learning materials and workflow diagrams.
*   **BASIC+**: Full access including Performance tracking, Certifications, and Prompt Lab.

Visit [CRM University](/crm/university) to start your training.

title: Roles & Permissions Deep Dive
content:
# Roles & Permissions

BasaltCRM uses a granular, hierarchical permission system that controls access at the module, widget, and action level.

## Role Hierarchy

| Role | Level | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Platform Admin** | 1000 | God-mode. Full access across ALL teams. Can assign Platform Admin to others. |
| **Super Admin** | 100 | Full access within their team. Can create Admins, Members, and Viewers. |
| **Admin** | 50 | Full access to department resources. Can create Members and Viewers. |
| **Member** | 10 | Standard access to assigned resources only. |
| **Viewer** | 0 | Read-only access to data. |

## Permission Granularity

Permissions are defined at three levels:

### 1. Module Level
Toggle entire modules on/off per role (e.g., hide "Lead Wizard" from Viewers).

### 2. Widget Level
Control individual widgets within a module (e.g., show Dashboard but hide Team Analytics widget from Members).

### 3. Action Level
Gate specific operations (e.g., allow Members to view leads but not delete them).

## Module Coverage

The permission system covers all 30+ modules:
*   Dashboard, Calendar, Accounts, Contacts, Opportunities
*   AI Lab, Sales Command, Contracts (incl. Deal Rooms)
*   Projects, Tasks, Dialer, University, Outreach
*   Lead Pools, Lead Wizard, FlowState, Messages
*   Form Builder, Invoices, Reports, Emails, Employees
*   Databox, Approvals, Cases, Notifications, Products, Quotes, Guard Rules

## Multi-Tenant Teams

Each team operates in full data isolation. Users can belong to one team, and all CRM data (leads, accounts, opportunities, etc.) is scoped to the team boundary.

title: API Reference & Developers
content:
# Developer Documentation

Build custom integrations with the BasaltCRM API.

## Quick Start

*   **Authentication**: Bearer Token (`sk_live_...`).
*   **Base URL**: `https://api.basaltcrm.com/v1`.
*   **Webhooks**: Subscribe to real-time events like `deal.won`, `lead.created`, `form.submitted`.

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Stack |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Framework** | Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript |
| **Database** | MongoDB Atlas + Prisma ORM |
| **UI** | Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Tremor, Framer Motion |
| **AI** | Vercel AI SDK, OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Google, Mistral |
| **Voice** | AWS Chime SDK, BasaltECHO (WebRTC) |
| **Email** | React Email, Resend, AWS SES |
| **Auth** | NextAuth.js (multi-provider: Google, GitHub, Azure AD) |
| **Storage** | OVH S3 Secure Containers |
| **Infra** | Plesk, Jenkins CI/CD, EventBridge |

## SOC2 Compliance & Security

BasaltCRM is built for enterprise requirements:
*   **Storage Isolation**: All client data and attachments reside in private S3-compatible buckets on OVH with mandatory KMS encryption.
*   **Access Control**: Strict team-scoping enforced at the database level via Prisma middleware.
*   **Audit Logging**: Every disruptive action (DELETE/PUT) is logged with the performing userId and timestamp.

## Agent Commerce (UCP / x402)

BasaltCRM includes a programmable Agent Commerce system compliant with the Unified Commerce Protocol:
*   **Catalog**: Browse the agent catalog via `GET /api/v1/agent/catalog`.
*   **Purchase**: Access premium resources using **x402 challenge/response** with SURGE/USDC on Base.
*   **Execution**: Once payment is verified, the resource (deployment link or API key) is returned.

## Self-Hosting

```
git clone https://github.com/BasaltHQ/crm-official.git
cd crm-official
npm install
cp .env.example .env && cp .env.local.example .env.local
npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed
npm run dev
```

Open `http://localhost:3000` and you're live.

## Resources

*   **Repo**: [github.com/BasaltHQ/crm-official](https://github.com/BasaltHQ/crm-official)
*   **Live Demo**: [crm.basalthq.com](https://crm.basalthq.com)
*   **Discord**: [Join Community](https://discord.gg/gcgNugyWkg)
*   **Developer Portal**: [/developers](/developers)
